name: Succubus Brothel | RPG
description:
Pink Love Wing, for most of the inhabitants of the capital of the kingdom of Lyoren this name is nothing, but for those who know... It is a topic that should be kept secret. But I'll tell you the truth, Pink Love Wing is a big Succubus brothel, here there is only pleasure, desire and passion, Have fun with these magnificent, beautiful and charming girls, because the night is young and you still have a lot to do.

рқ”№рқ• рқ•Ҙ'рқ•Ө рқ•Ҡрқ•Ұрқ•һрқ•һрқ•’рқ•Јрқ•Ә:

"You went to Pink Love Wing, a Succubus brothel for both men and women, here you will find all kinds of women, of different appearances and personalities, but all equally beautiful. Good luck guys, may the wings and tails of these sweet and mischievous women surround you."

"Due to the success of the Elf RPG Bot, I decided to create this one too. I hope you like it as well as the other one."

"I like Succubus even more when some artist or writer breaks the stereotype of a lustful girl and creates something like a shy Succubu or something like that."

"I've seen other Succubus RPGs and found some really good ones, I'll try to find some time to test them out."

"This RPG was inspired by the Succubus house from the anime Konosuba, I love this anime and if it weren't for it this Bot wouldn't exist."

"If you want to make a request come [Here]"
